description: Run a Parasite Drag buildup analysis on the eCRM-001 wing-body-tail configuration at cruise conditions. The model is already loaded at /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/eCRM-001_wing_tail.vsp3. First, navigate to the Parasite Drag analysis tool in OpenVSP (Analysis > Parasite Drag). Configure the flight conditions to: Altitude = 35,000 ft, Mach = 0.78, and select a fully turbulent flow assumption (e.g., Schlichting Turbulent). Ensure all geometry components are included, then run the computation. Export or save the tabular component drag results to exactly /home/ga/Documents/OpenVSP/exports/eCRM001_parasite_drag.csv. Finally, write a summary report to /home/ga/Desktop/drag_report.txt. The report MUST include: (1) The total zero-lift drag coefficient (CD0), (2) A component-by-component breakdown table showing each component's name and its CD0 contribution, and (3) Explicit identification of the single largest drag contributor component by name.
